assertions.title: No hardcoded localhost in auth source files

steps.expected: No hardcoded localhost:3000 remains in forgot-password, reset-password, sign-in, and sign-up routes
steps.observed: No matches found in the auth-related route files checked via repo search

evidence.sourceCheck: No matches found for localhost:3000 in auth-related web route files.

assertions.title: PUT /api/interviews/:id exists and returns updated interview

steps.action: Create an authenticated owner user, onboarding profile, project, and interview record
steps.observed: Owner project 3 and interview 1 were created successfully

steps.action: PUT /api/interviews/1 with updated title and transcript as the owner
steps.expected: 200 response with updated interview payload and refreshed updatedAt
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with title='Updated repo-shell interview title' and updatedAt='2026-03-15T04:07:49.827Z'

curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/interviews -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -b /Users/ashishhuddar/.factory/missions/8d555b3e-2948-4f0c-abd1-2fe8dc0952a9/evidence/feature-fixes/repo-shell-api/owner.cookies.txt -c /Users/ashishhuddar/.factory/missions/8d555b3e-2948-4f0c-abd1-2fe8dc0952a9/evidence/feature-fixes/repo-shell-api/owner.cookies.txt -d '{"projectId": 3, "title": "Initial repo-shell interview", "transcript": "Customer explained that the dashboard is slow to scan, wants clearer edit controls, and needs confidence that updates save immediately for product review meetings."}'
